name: A Scare at Bedtime
overview: A Scare at Bedtime was an Irish television show, produced by Double Z Enterprises and broadcast by RTÉ, featuring the two puppets Podge and Rodge as the hosts of a spooky tales and urban myths comedy show. It ran from 1997 until January 2006.

trailers.title: Podge & Rodge: A Scare At Bedtime Season 1
